case_title: PACIFIC PJW RESTAURANTS, INC. VS ANGOTTI, ANTHONY

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JAN-12-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02 TRIAL OF NOV-15-1993 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROCESSED CLAIM SENT TO PACIF. PJW REST. RETURNED, FORW. ORDER EXPIRED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PACIFIC PJW RESTAURANTS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ANGOTTI, ANTHONY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
DEFEND'S REQUEST TO FILE LATE APPEAL FILED AND SENT TO DEPT. 6.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ANGOTTI, ANTHONY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC PJW RESTAURANTS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANGOTTI, ANTHONY $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,515.00, DEFT'S NAME CORRECTED BY ORAL STIP. DEFT ENTITLED TO AN OFFSETT FOR REASONABLE VALUE OF SERVICES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
REQUEST FOR FILING LATE APPEAL DENIED BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY. (UNTIMELY)
